openings.title: QA Analysts (Health Informatics)
openings.summary: Duties: Perform quality assurance and testing for health information systems and applications for health information systems. Analyze, improve healthcare data quality and operational efficiency. Develop
requirements: Experience with QA workflows for healthcare or regulated systems.
Hands-on testing for web applications, APIs, and data validation.

openings.title: Software Engineers (AI Data Scientist)
openings.summary: Duties: Design, develop, and implement AI models, algorithms, and applications using Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Java Script, LLMs, Gen AI, Docker, NLP, Agile, Open
requirements: Strong Python and SQL proficiency for model and data workflows.
Experience with LLM/GenAI tooling and model lifecycle practices.
Hands-on development with cloud and container tooling.

openings.title: Senior Software Developers
openings.summary: Duties: Provide technical leadership to design, develop, analyze and implement software applications using Java, J2EE technologies, C, C++, Spring Boot, Oracle, Web Services, etc. (or).Net
requirements: Deep experience with Java/J2EE and enterprise service architecture.
Ability to lead design and mentoring across delivery teams.
Strong debugging and performance optimization skills.

openings.title: Senior Software Engineers
openings.summary: Duties: Provide technical leadership to design, develop, test and maintain web applications using XAMPP, PHP, DRUPAL, Docker, GITHUB, SOAP, Rest API, Linux, HTML, MySQL, JavaScript,
requirements: Production experience with PHP/Drupal and modern web stacks.
Knowledge of REST/SOAP integration and Linux deployments.
Collaborative coding standards and source-control discipline.

openings.title: Senior Software Developers
openings.summary: Duties: Provide technical leadership to create, modify, test code and script for web based applications using Java, J2EE technologies, Java Script, Frameworks, Spring, HTML, CSS,
requirements: Strong full-stack development in Java ecosystem frameworks.
Experience writing maintainable code for large web applications.
Ability to collaborate with QA and business teams effectively.
